title: Stir-Fried Peppers with Gooey Date Sauce
description: Sweet and spicy stir-fry dish with gooey date sauce and colorful peppers.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced peppy and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the chopped date and cook for another 2-3 minutes, until the mixture is caramelized.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, stir, and fry. Pour the sauce over the peppy and date mixture.
Stir-fry everything together for 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Note: Adjust the amount of soy sauce to taste, and add more filipino for extra flavor.
